title: ClinicalFindings
description: Shared request body for both webhook tools (red_flag_check and triage_set). Mirrors the MVP ClinicalFindings Pydantic contract. Only presenting_complaint is required; every other field is optional AND omittable. A missing/absent field means 'not asked' and must NOT be treated as a negative — do not coerce omission to 'none'/false.

presenting_complaint.description: The main problem the caller is presenting with. Required.

pain_score.description: Pain intensity 0-10. Omit if not asked/unknown.

bleeding.description: Bleeding severity. Omit if not asked.

consciousness.description: Level of consciousness. Omit if not asked.

breathing_difficulty.description: Difficulty breathing severity. Omit if not asked.

chest_pain.description: Whether the caller has chest pain. Omit if not asked.

chest_pain_radiating.description: Whether chest pain radiates (arm/jaw/back). Omit if not asked.

stroke_signs_fast.description: FAST stroke signs present (face droop, arm weakness, speech difficulty). Omit if not asked.

allergic_reaction_severe.description: Severe allergic reaction present. Omit if not asked.

suicidal_ideation.description: Suicidal ideation expressed. Omit if not asked.

onset.description: Free-text description of when the complaint started. Omit if not asked.
